reviews.comment:
El miércoles 21/1/26 de vuelta, al ser socio del ACA también paramos de ida 11/1/26, comimos algo tipo mediodía en la confitería del ACA Chascomus km. 122 muy bien atendidos, cómodos, impecable y limpio, muy serviciales y amables.
En cambio en la playa de YPF nos atendió una playera soberbia, mal predispuesta, mala onda, mala energía, a tal punto que no carganos combustible y nos fuimos casi espantados, lamentable experiencia en la playa de la estación de servicio !!

(Translated by Google)
On Wednesday, January 21, 2026, on our return trip, since we were also members of the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina), we stopped there on the outbound journey on January 11, 2026. We had lunch around midday at the ACA Chascomús cafeteria at kilometer 122. The service was excellent, the place was comfortable, spotless, and clean, and the staff were very helpful and friendly.

However, at the YPF gas station, we were served by an arrogant, unfriendly, and unpleasant attendant. She had a terrible attitude and negative energy, to the point that we didn't fill up our tanks and left almost terrified. A truly regrettable experience at the gas station!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tOVWVVWmpUV0ZMWnpKaExVWmFjbXRJUTJKWVFWRRAB

Good place to take a break

reviews.comment:
Muy buena estacion de servicio la atencion excelente destaco la atencion de la playara vanesa super atenta me atendio super amable con una sonrisa q destaco me ayudo a poder pagar con la app.... me queria convencer de hacerme socia pero por ahora no puedo igual me lleve su contacto para mas adelante hacerme socia!!!! Excelente lugar recomiendo 100%

(Translated by Google)
Very good gas station, excellent service. I especially want to highlight the attention from the attendant Vanessa; she was super attentive and served me very kindly with a smile that really stood out. She even helped me pay with the app. I wanted to convince her to become a member, but I can't right now. I did, though, take her contact information so I can become a member later! Excellent place, I recommend it 100%.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21oVU9UVTRXRk4wTlZOQmNHOVJSamx2VFhOVWJFRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena la gente de la playa y predispuestos a tratar al cliente como a una amigo, conocido de todos los días!!!! Es lindo sentirse bien atendido!!!!!!

(Translated by Google)
The people at the beach were wonderful and always willing to treat customers like friends, like everyday acquaintances! It's so nice to feel so well taken care of!
